## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX pod stand-up to discuss team updates, client progress, and leadership changes.](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Darrell Etherington is leaving GrowthX at the end of the month; Kyle will temporarily take over as MD](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [New business opportunities emerging, including potential upsells from existing clients (e.g., Engine, Airbyte)](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Challenges with engineering support for client projects (e.g., Zoopla, Airbyte) persist](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Team exploring AI tools (e.g., Gemini in Google Docs) to improve workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

## Topics

### Leadership Transition

  - [Darrell Etherington leaving GrowthX end of month for new opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Kyle (founding team member) to temporarily take over as MD](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Transition plan in place; Darrell available for handoff through next couple weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

### Client Updates

  - [Most clients in good shape, with some exceptions (e.g., Aimbit, Airbyte)](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Engine: Potential upsell opportunity for consumer-oriented site](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Airbyte: Challenges with engineering support for pipeline setup](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Backlight: Progress made, under 40 items left to clear](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Prophecy: In chaotic state but potentially lucrative; headless organization currently](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Ehtisham demonstrated efficient use of Gemini in Google Docs for repetitive tasks (e.g., meta descriptions, summaries)](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Team discussing need to create pipeline tickets for recurring client requests](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Exploring ways to automate manual processes through engineering support](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### AI Technology Discussion

  - [Comparison of AI writing capabilities: Gemini showing improvements over ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [ChatGPT-5 launch reception mixed; users reporting issues with prompting and performance](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Team members experimenting with different AI tools for various tasks](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Darrell to sync with Kyle regarding MD transition and ongoing projects](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Carrie to follow up with Jacob about Airbyte reporting for upcoming meeting](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Team to create structured ticket for Sunbit's recurring document requirements](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Marcel to sync with Prophecy and Engine teams about potential upsell opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Ehtisham to send message to discuss strategy for Aimbit](https://fathom.video/share/MvZ6HEtcMauB8ob4D_QHPgy6athYvXVd?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
